decision_summary.recommended_path: Google Sheets first, Notion later as a read-friendly layer if needed.
decision_summary.why: The resource card workflow is row-based, source-audit-heavy, and partner-entry-friendly. Sheets supports CSV import, filters, validation, simple formulas, and easier Codex round-trips before a richer Notion view is worth maintaining.

public_safety.public_export_rule: Publish only blank structures, selection rationale, and approval gates. Real private board creation requires Kevin approval.

selection_matrix.reason: 資源卡、來源檢查、新鮮度 log 和 QA checklist 都是 row-based。
Sheets 比較容易用欄位驗證、篩選、排序與批次貼上。
兩者都可做 review view；Sheets 更適合先穩住欄位，Notion 更適合後續看板閱讀。
CSV / XLSX / JSON round-trip 比較直接，適合先建立 proof。
Notion 卡片較適合閱讀，但欄位治理成熟前容易變成敘事散件。
兩者都需要 private permission 設計；公開 repo 只放空白模板與規格。

recommended_tabs.purpose: Kevin weekly review summary, counts, blockers, and next review.
Main source cards created from public sources.
Public source URL, last-seen date, freshness, and missing-field tracking.
Items needing Kevin review, stop-condition decisions, or private boundary checks.
Small tasks for source collection, field cleanup, and QA.
Scheduled or manual freshness checks and no-op results.
Approval gates, public/private boundary, and stop conditions.

implementation_ladder.name: Public selection draft
implementation_ladder.allowed_data: blank templates and public-safe field design

implementation_ladder.name: Private blank Sheet setup
implementation_ladder.allowed_data: blank rows and fictional examples only

implementation_ladder.name: Real public-resource maintenance
implementation_ladder.allowed_data: public source records reviewed by Kevin

when_to_add_notion: Sheets tabs and fields have been stable for at least one review cycle.
Kevin wants a partner-facing or discussion-friendly card view.
The data boundary is already private and permissioned.
notion_should_not_do: Replace source-of-truth rows before fields are stable.
Hold real case records in a public or loosely shared workspace.
Create external notifications or assignments without approval.

taiwan_fit_gate.wording_fit: Uses practical labels such as 工作板, 欄位, 分頁, 待覆核, 暫停, 新鮮度, and no-op checkpoint.
taiwan_fit_gate.workplace_habit_fit: Sheets-first matches a small team pattern: stabilize rows and review rules before introducing a more narrative Notion view.
taiwan_fit_gate.mobile_readability_fit: Public page section uses short headings and table summaries; detailed fields live in CSV artifacts.

next_version_candidates.candidate: Build a public-safe citizen finance-life snapshot prototype brief.
Create a private blank Google Sheets workboard only after Kevin approval.
Draft report-first freshness automation without external writes.
